name: Decal
description: Decals are Materials that are projected onto meshes in your level, including Static Meshes and Skeletal Meshes.

parameters.name: lifespan
parameters.description: Time until automatically destroyed in seconds

parameters.name: fade_screen_size
parameters.description: Size percentage in screen to fade out

functions.name: SetSize
functions.description: Sets the size of this Decal.

functions.name: SetFadeIn
functions.description: Starts fading in this Decal after a delay.

parameters.name: start_delay
parameters.description: Seconds to wait before starting the fade-in

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration of the fade-in in seconds

functions.name: SetFadeOut
functions.description: Starts fading out this Decal after a delay.

parameters.name: start_delay
parameters.description: Seconds to wait before starting the fade-out

parameters.name: duration
parameters.description: Duration of the fade-out in seconds

parameters.name: destroy_after_fade_out
parameters.description: Whether to destroy the Decal after fade-out finishes
